summary: Backend testing of 6 refactored route modules (push, users, friends, calls, ai, search). All 16 tests passed - all endpoints respond correctly with proper status codes after server.py was refactored from ~3600 to ~2600 lines.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - registers new user, returns token (200)
POST /api/auth/login - login with credentials, returns token (200)
GET /api/friends - get friends list with auth (200)
GET /api/search/universal?q=test - returns all result categories (users, posts, reels, stories, live, hashtags)
GET /api/calls/history - get call history with auth (200)
GET /api/ai/personas - get AI personas with auth (200)
critical_code_review_comments: routes/shared.py: Properly configured with db connection, helper functions (get_current_user, get_user_by_id)
routes/push.py: VAPID keys properly loaded, exports send_push_notification for other modules
routes/users.py: Properly excludes password_hash from responses, includes is_user_online check
routes/friends.py: Complete friend request lifecycle (send, accept, decline, cancel, remove)
routes/calls.py: WebRTC signaling support, call history, set_connection_manager for WebSocket integration
routes/ai.py: Multiple AI features (text gen, enhance, chat, image gen, personas, search)
routes/search.py: Universal search across users, posts, reels, stories, live, hashtags
All route modules properly exclude MongoDB _id field with {"_id": 0} in queries
All routes properly included in server.py via api_router.include_router()

test_credentials.note: Tests create unique users per test class with TEST_ prefix

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing (all with TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring of server.py completed successfully. 6 route modules (push, users, friends, calls, ai, search) extracted and working. All endpoints respond with proper status codes. Server.py reduced from ~3600 to ~2600 lines. Route modules properly organized under /app/backend/routes/ with shared.py for common utilities.
